nasb.text: The Lord, the God of their fathers, sent word to them again and again by His messengers, because He had compassion on His people and on His dwelling place;

esv.text: The Lord, the God of their fathers, sent persistently to them by his messengers, because he had compassion on his people and on his dwelling place.

cnv.text: 耶和華他們列祖的　神，因為愛惜自己的子民和居所，就常常差派使者警戒他們。

ccb.text: 他们祖先的上帝耶和华因为怜爱祂的子民和祂的居所，就不断派使者来劝告他们。
